runSummary.title: Run summary
runSummary.description: User-facing deep investigation summary for the latest lookup, including runtime state, operator readiness, coverage, artifacts, and warnings.

resultBuckets.title: Result buckets
resultBuckets.description: Counts and interpretation guide for activity events by visibility class, result bucket, and event type.

diagnosticTrace.title: Diagnostic trace
diagnosticTrace.description: Sanitized per-run diagnostics covering target resolution, operator bootstrap, graph expansion, discovery cycles, comment scan batches, and final blocking points.

ambiguousActivityCandidates.title: Ambiguous activity candidates
ambiguousActivityCandidates.description: Ambiguous comment and liked-content matches kept separate from confirmed activity events.

ambiguousCommentCandidates.title: Ambiguous comment candidates (legacy compatibility)
ambiguousCommentCandidates.description: Comment-only ambiguous username matches kept for compatibility with the earlier public comment-hunter contract.
